completed_tasks.name: Investigate empty/TBD knockout bracket
completed_tasks.detail: Two root causes found and confirmed with code evidence.

completed_tasks.name: Fix bracket-receives-no-group-data bug
completed_tasks.detail: app/(main)/predictions/[stage]/page.tsx now always builds matchesByGroup from all group matches. User-confirmed correct.

completed_tasks.name: Correct R32 placeholder table
completed_tasks.detail: 16-match R32 (m73-88) Winner/Runner-up/3rd format. Verified: 12 winners x1, 12 runners-up x1, 8 thirds (all away), no dupes. User-approved.

completed_tasks.name: Correct R16/QF feeders
completed_tasks.detail: R16 (m89-96) + QF (m97-100) cross-bracket feeders. References each upstream match exactly once. SF/third/Final left untouched (already correct).

completed_tasks.name: Verify resolver ordinal->matchNumber mapping
completed_tasks.detail: MAKE-OR-BREAK check PASSED. KnockoutBracket.tsx + lib/predictedStandings.ts both key predictedWinners by matchNumber; stageOffsets {R32:72,R16:88,QF:96,SF:100} resolve correctly. R16+ were empty only due to bad feeder data, not a resolver bug.

completed_tasks.name: Stage fix scripts
completed_tasks.detail: migrate-real-fixtures.js (fresh-seed parity, R32+R16+QF) and fix-knockout-bracket.js (production overwrite by matchNumber, count assertions for 16/8/4, does not touch SF/third/Final).

completed_tasks.name: Commit + push verified code
completed_tasks.detail: Committed 3 files (page.tsx, migrate-real-fixtures.js, fix-knockout-bracket.js) as f75ad30, pushed to origin/main.

completed_tasks.name: Local CI-equivalent validation
completed_tasks.detail: npm ci (fixed corrupt node_modules) -> lint PASS, test 77/77 PASS, build PASS (exit 0). .next produced (73M). Used CI env (DATABASE_URL=file:./test.db + ephemeral test.db via prisma db push); production/dev DB untouched.

remaining_tasks.name: Apply fix-knockout-bracket.js to PRODUCTION DB
remaining_tasks.detail: GATED on explicit user approval. Requires: (1) confirm prod DATABASE_URL/path on Infomaniak (may NOT be prisma/dev.db), (2) back up the live SQLite file first: cp <prod.db> <prod.db>.bak-$(date +%Y%m%d-%H%M%S), (3) run `node fix-knockout-bracket.js` with prod DATABASE_URL, (4) re-read a few rows to confirm writes.

remaining_tasks.name: Deploy .next build to Infomaniak
remaining_tasks.detail: Per DEPLOYMENT-CHEATSHEET.md. User said keep the produced .next build for upload. NOT yet deployed.

decisions.decision: Third-place assignment uses ordered best-thirds (top-8 ranked, positional by matchNumber), NOT FIFA Annex C
decisions.rationale: Matches existing resolver in both display and scoring paths; cluster labels like '3rd A/B/C/D/F' are cosmetic (only the '3rd ' prefix is parsed). Annex C accuracy would require resolver code changes - declared out of scope / optional separate task. User-approved.

decisions.decision: Production repair SETs the correct bracket by matchNumber, not regex-reformat
decisions.rationale: Live data was generated positionally and is structurally invalid (no thirds, phantom groups M-P); a reformat cannot fix it. Superseded fix-r32-placeholders.js and fix-r32-bracket.js.

decisions.decision: Committed only 3 files; excluded superseded scripts + debug notes + CLAUDE.md
decisions.rationale: fix-r32-bracket.js / fix-r32-placeholders.js are superseded; keep history clean.

uncommitted_files: .next/ (untracked build artifact, 73M - keep for Infomaniak upload)
prisma/test.db or test.db (untracked ephemeral CI test DB - safe to delete)
next_action: Decide whether to apply fix-knockout-bracket.js to production: confirm prod DATABASE_URL on Infomaniak, back up the live SQLite file, then run `node fix-knockout-bracket.js` with prod DATABASE_URL. Separately, upload the .next build per DEPLOYMENT-CHEATSHEET.md.
context_notes: Code is committed (f75ad30) and pushed to origin/main; local CI-equivalent validation is fully green (lint, 77/77 tests, build). NOTHING has been applied to any production/real DB and nothing deployed - both are explicitly gated on user approval. The resolver itself is correct; only the DB feeder DATA needs the one-time fix-knockout-bracket.js run on prod. Full bracket table (m73-m104) and verification counts are in the debug file.
